title: Cache player list across ticks
prompt:
In Garry's Mod server Lua, a Tick/Think hook currently does ipairs(player.GetAll()) every tick. Show a faster pattern that keeps a cached player table and refreshes it only when players join or leave (not every tick).

Return exactly one fenced lua code block, then exactly one line in the form Reason: <reason>. Do not use tools or external resources.

oracle.expectedPrimitive: cached player.GetAll refreshed on connect/disconnect (or player.Iterator)
